## Testing

- [ ] Tested against **sandbox** environment (never production for PRs)
- [ ] Verified no credentials, `.env` values, or personal data appear in the diff
- [ ] Manually tested the affected views / flows
- [ ] Confirmed demo fallback still works when DXLink is unavailable

## Checklist

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new external dependencies added without prior discussion
- [ ] All secrets sourced from `config.py` / environment variables — nothing hardcoded
- [ ] PR title follows the imperative format: "Add …" / "Fix …" / "Update …"
